PreToolUse.description: Warn before modifying an existing Effect SQL migration
PreToolUse.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.path'); if [[ "$f" == *apps/server/src/db/migrations/0* ]]; then echo '{"decision": "ask", "reason": "Modifying an existing Effect SQL migration can break deployments"}'; else echo '{"decision": "approve"}'; fi

PreToolUse.description: Enforce NNNN_description.ts naming for new migration files
PreToolUse.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.path'); if [[ "$f" == *apps/server/src/db/migrations/* ]]; then if [[ "$f" =~ [0-9]{4}_[a-z_]+\.ts$ ]]; then echo '{"decision": "approve"}'; else echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Migration must match NNNN_description.ts (e.g. 0002_add_contacts.ts)"}'; fi; else echo '{"decision": "approve"}'; fi

PreToolUse.description: Block reading .env files — use Config.string() in Effect code instead
PreToolUse.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.path'); if [[ "$f" == *.env ]] && [[ "$f" != *.env.example ]]; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Never read .env or credentials. Use Config.string() in Effect code."}'; else echo '{"decision": "approve"}'; fi

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git push.*(--force-with-lease)'; then echo '{"decision": "approve"}'; elif echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git push.*([[:space:]]--force([[:space:]]|$)|[[:space:]]-f([[:space:]]|$))'; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Force push is destructive. Use --force-with-lease or ask the user first."}'; else echo '{"decision": "approve"}'; fi

PostToolUse.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.path'); if [[ "$f" == *.ts || "$f" == *.tsx || "$f" == *.json ]]; then biome check --write --no-errors-on-unmatched "$f" 2>/dev/null; elif [[ "$f" == *.md ]]; then dprint fmt "$f" 2>/dev/null; fi; true

PostToolUse.description: Run Biome/dprint formatter after AST edits
PostToolUse.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.path'); if [[ "$f" == *.ts || "$f" == *.tsx || "$f" == *.json ]]; then biome check --write --no-errors-on-unmatched "$f" 2>/dev/null; elif [[ "$f" == *.md ]]; then dprint fmt "$f" 2>/dev/null; fi; true

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.path'); if [[ "$f" == *.ts || "$f" == *.tsx || "$f" == *.json ]]; then biome check --write --no-errors-on-unmatched "$f" 2>/dev/null; elif [[ "$f" == *.md ]]; then dprint fmt "$f" 2>/dev/null; fi; true

PostToolUse.description: Remind to write a migration when domain schema changes
PostToolUse.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.path'); if [[ "$f" == *packages/domain/src/schema/*.ts ]] && [[ "$f" != *.test.ts ]]; then echo '{"systemMessage": "Domain schema changed. Check if an Effect SQL migration is needed in apps/server/src/db/migrations/"}'; fi; true

PostToolUse.description: Remind to write a migration when domain schema changes
PostToolUse.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.path'); if [[ "$f" == *packages/domain/src/schema/*.ts ]] && [[ "$f" != *.test.ts ]]; then echo '{"systemMessage": "Domain schema changed. Check if an Effect SQL migration is needed in apps/server/src/db/migrations/"}'; fi; true

PostToolUse.description: Remind to run Lingui extract when macros are added
Remind to run Lingui extract when macros are added
Remind to run Lingui extract when macros are added
Audit log for migration file writes
PostToolUse.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.path'); if [[ "$f" == *apps/server/src/db/migrations/* ]]; then echo "[$(date +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] $f" >> /Users/guillem/programacio/codi/autonom/batuda/.claude/migration-audit.log; fi; true

PostToolUse.description: Audit log for migration file edits
PostToolUse.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.path'); if [[ "$f" == *apps/server/src/db/migrations/* ]]; then echo "[$(date +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] $f" >> /Users/guillem/programacio/codi/autonom/batuda/.claude/migration-audit.log; fi; true

SessionStart.description: Provision per-worktree resources on session start

Stop.description: Remind to run pnpm check-types when TypeScript files changed
Stop.command: cd /Users/guillem/programacio/codi/autonom/batuda && git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$' && echo '{"systemMessage": "TypeScript files changed. Run: pnpm check-types"}' || true
